config.asttweaks.title: AST-Tweaks Configuration
config.asttweaks.scoreboard.enabled.tool: Enable or disable the custom scoreboard renderer
config.asttweaks.scoreboard.paging.enabl: Allow scrolling through long scoreboards using page up/down
config.asttweaks.scoreboard.maxLines.too: Maximum number of lines to display when paging is disabled
config.asttweaks.scoreboard.pageSize.too: Number of entries to show per page when paging is enabled
config.asttweaks.scoreboard.showRank.too: Display rank numbers (starting from 0) next to each entry
config.asttweaks.scoreboard.positionEdit: Open position editor to drag and drop the scoreboard
Drag the scoreboard to move it. Use the slider to adjust scale.
config.asttweaks.scoreboard.scale.toolti: Adjust the size of the scoreboard (0.5x - 2.0x)
Background color for the scoreboard header
config.asttweaks.scoreboard.bodyColor.to: Background color for the scoreboard body
config.asttweaks.autoeat.enabled.tooltip: Toggle automatic eating when hunger is low
Allows automatic eating even while performing other actions like sprinting
config.asttweaks.autoeat.hungerThreshold: Automatically eat food when hunger is at or below this value (0-20)
config.asttweaks.autoeat.blacklist.title: Food Blacklist Settings
config.asttweaks.autoeat.blacklist.help: Click to allow/deny automatic use of food
config.asttweaks.automove.direction.tool: Select the direction for auto movement
config.asttweaks.entityculling.disableAl: Disable rendering of all entities except players
config.asttweaks.entityculling.disableAr: Disable rendering of armor stand entities
config.asttweaks.entityculling.disableFa: Disable rendering of falling block entities
config.asttweaks.entityculling.disableDe: Disable rendering of entities with 0 health
config.asttweaks.entityculling.itemLimit: Maximum item entities to render per frame (-1 for unlimited)
config.asttweaks.entityculling.xpOrbLimi: Maximum XP orbs to render per frame (-1 for unlimited)
config.asttweaks.lavahighlight.enabled.t: Toggle highlighting of lava source and flowing lava blocks
config.asttweaks.lavahighlight.sourceCol: Highlight color for lava source blocks
config.asttweaks.lavahighlight.flowingCo: Highlight color for flowing lava blocks
config.asttweaks.notepad.enabled.tooltip: Toggle the notepad feature for saving notes
screen.asttweaks.notepad.title: Notepad
config.asttweaks.autototem.enabled.toolt: Automatically move a totem to offhand after one is used
config.asttweaks.autorepair.enabled.tool: Fast repair Mending items using experience bottles from offhand (Tweakeroo style)
config.asttweaks.autorepair.clicksPerTic: Number of times to use experience bottles per tick (higher = faster repair)
config.asttweaks.autorepair.whitelistMod: When enabled, only items in the list will be repaired. When disabled, all items except those in the list will be repaired.
config.asttweaks.autorepair.targetSlot.t: Hotbar slot to use for repairing items (1-9)
config.asttweaks.autorepair.itemlist.hel: Click to add/remove items from the whitelist
Click to add/remove items from the blacklist
